Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> <PRICE>40. kr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Fixed corrupted Unicode characters in titles (e.g., 'Pa\\u221a\\u00bcions' to 'Passions', 'Hau\\u221a\\u00bc-Gebett-Buch' to 'Haus-Gebett-Buch'). 2. Corrected the tag '<PRIZE>' to '<PRICE>' for consistency. 3. Fixed the author name 'Stahiii' to 'Stahl'. 4. Corrected the title 'Nouvelie Grammaire' to 'Nouvelle Grammaire'. 5. parsed.explanation: 1. Fixed corrupted Unicode characters in titles (e.g., 'Pa\u221a\u00bcions' to 'Passions', 'Hau\u221a\u00bc-Gebett-Buch' to 'Haus-Gebett-Buch'). 2. Corrected the tag '<PRIZE>' to '<PRICE>' for consistency. 3. Fixed the author name 'Stahiii' to 'Stahl'. 4. Corrected the title 'Nouvelie Grammaire' to 'Nouvelle Grammaire'. 5. Removed the corrupted Unicode character '\u221a\u2020' which appeared as a separator. 6. Ensured all closing tags match their opening tags. 7. Maintained the structure of nested XML tags for bibliographic entries.
